    "content": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n\tempty \"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/emptypb\"\n)\n\n// GetRule gets a rule\nfunc (s *Server) GetRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get rule\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\trule, err := s.store.GetRule(ctx,\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(r.NamespaceKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)),\n\t\tr.Id)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get rule\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", rule))\n\treturn rule, err\n}\n\n// ListRules lists all rules for a flag\nfunc (s *Server) ListRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.ListRuleRequest) (*flipt.RuleList, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list rules\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference))\n\tresults, err := s.store.ListRules(ctx, storage.ListWithParameters(flag, r))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp := flipt.RuleList{\n\t\tRules: results.Results,\n\t}\n\n\ttotal, err := s.store.CountRules(ctx, flag)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp.TotalCount = int32(total)\n\tresp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list rules\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", &resp))\n\treturn &resp, nil\n}\n\n// CreateRule creates a rule\nfunc (s *Server) CreateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create rule\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create rule\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", rule))\n\treturn rule, err\n}\n\n// UpdateRule updates an existing rule\nfunc (s *Server) UpdateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update rule\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\trule, err := s.store.UpdateRule(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update rule\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", rule))\n\treturn rule, err\n}\n\n// DeleteRule deletes a rule\nfunc (s *Server) DeleteRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRuleRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete rule\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tif err := s.store.DeleteRule(ctx, r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n}\n\n// OrderRules orders rules\nfunc (s *Server) OrderRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRulesRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"order rules\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tif err := s.store.OrderRules(ctx, r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n}\n\n// CreateDistribution creates a distribution\nfunc (s *Server) CreateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create distribution\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tdistribution, err := s.store.CreateDistribution(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create distribution\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", distribution))\n\treturn distribution, err\n}\n\n// UpdateDistribution updates an existing distribution\nfunc (s *Server) UpdateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update distribution\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tdistribution, err := s.store.UpdateDistribution(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update distribution\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", distribution))\n\treturn distribution, err\n}\n\n// DeleteDistribution deletes a distribution\nfunc (s *Server) DeleteDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete distribution\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tif err := s.store.DeleteDistribution(ctx, r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n}\n",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluator.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tvar resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\n\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:    r.RequestId,\n\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     r.EntityId,\n\t\tContext:      r.Context,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t}\n\n\tif resp != nil {\n\t\tspanAttrs = append(spanAttrs,\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.Value),\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// BatchEvaluate evaluates a request for multiple flags and entities\nfunc (s *Server) BatchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.batchEvaluate(ctx, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) batchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tres := flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*flipt.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(r.GetRequests())),\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should change this to a native batch query instead of looping through\n\t// each request individually\n\tfor _, req := range r.GetRequests() {\n\t\t// ensure all requests have the same namespace\n\t\tif req.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\t\treq.NamespaceKey = r.NamespaceKey\n\t\t} else if req.NamespaceKey != r.NamespaceKey {\n\t\t\treturn &res, errs.InvalidFieldError(\"namespace_key\", \"must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif r.GetExcludeNotFound() && errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// TODO: we also need to validate each request, we should likely do this in the validation middleware\n\t\tf, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\tRequestId:    req.RequestId,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tEntityId:     req.EntityId,\n\t\t\tContext:      req.Context,\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Error(\"error evaluating flag\", zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tf.RequestId = \"\"\n\t\tres.Responses = append(res.Responses, f)\n\t}\n\n\treturn &res, nil\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluator.go",
    "numLines": 132,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 132
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "originalFile": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tvar resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\n\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:    r.RequestId,\n\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     r.EntityId,\n\t\tContext:      r.Context,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t}\n\n\tif resp != nil {\n\t\tspanAttrs = append(spanAttrs,\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.Value),\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// BatchEvaluate evaluates a request for multiple flags and entities\nfunc (s *Server) BatchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.batchEvaluate(ctx, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) batchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tres := flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*flipt.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(r.GetRequests())),\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should change this to a native batch query instead of looping through\n\t// each request individually\n\tfor _, req := range r.GetRequests() {\n\t\t// ensure all requests have the same namespace\n\t\tif req.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\t\treq.NamespaceKey = r.NamespaceKey\n\t\t} else if req.NamespaceKey != r.NamespaceKey {\n\t\t\treturn &res, errs.InvalidFieldError(\"namespace_key\", \"must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif r.GetExcludeNotFound() && errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// TODO: we also need to validate each request, we should likely do this in the validation middleware\n\t\tf, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\tRequestId:    req.RequestId,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tEntityId:     req.EntityId,\n\t\t\tContext:      req.Context,\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Error(\"error evaluating flag\", zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tf.RequestId = \"\"\n\t\tres.Responses = append(res.Responses, f)\n\t}\n\n\treturn &res, nil\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package common\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"database/sql\"\n\t\"encoding/base64\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nfunc compactJSONString(jsonString string) (string, error) {\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tif err := json.Compact(&buf, []byte(jsonString)); err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\treturn buf.String(), nil\n}\n\nfunc emptyAsNil(str string) *string {\n\tif str == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn &str\n}\n\n// GetFlag gets a flag with variants by key\nfunc (s *Store) GetFlag(ctx context.Context, p storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n\n\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": p.Key}).\n\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\t\tScan(\n\t\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n\t)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tflag.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tflag.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, flag_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": flag.NamespaceKey, \"flag_key\": flag.Key}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn flag, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvariant              flipt.Variant\n\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tattachment           sql.NullString\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n\t\t\t&attachment,\n\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn flag, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvariant.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\t\tvariant.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tif attachment.Valid {\n\t\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn flag, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvariant.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &variant)\n\t}\n\n\treturn flag, rows.Err()\n}\n\ntype optionalVariant struct {\n\tId           sql.NullString\n\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n\tKey          sql.NullString\n\tFlagKey      sql.NullString\n\tName         sql.NullString\n\tDescription  sql.NullString\n\tAttachment   sql.NullString\n\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n}\n\n// ListFlags lists all flags with variants\nfunc (s *Store) ListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflags   []*flipt.Flag\n\t\tresults = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}\n\n\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n\t)\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar offset uint64\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\toffset = token.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// keep track of flags so we can associated variants in second query.\n\tflagsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Flag)\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n\n\t\t\tfCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tfUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t&fCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&fUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag.CreatedAt = fCreatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tflag.UpdatedAt = fUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\t\tflags = append(flags, flag)\n\t\tflagsByKey[flag.Key] = flag\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.setVariants(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), flagsByKey); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar next *flipt.Flag\n\n\tif len(flags) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tnext = flags[len(flags)-1]\n\t\tflags = flags[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n\t}\n\n\tresults.Results = flags\n\n\tif next != nil {\n\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(flags))})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n\t}\n\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Store) setVariants(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, flagsByKey map[string]*flipt.Flag) error {\n\tallFlagKeys := make([]string, 0, len(flagsByKey))\n\tfor k := range flagsByKey {\n\t\tallFlagKeys = append(allFlagKeys, k)\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"flag_key\": allFlagKeys}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvariant    optionalVariant\n\t\t\tvCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t\tvUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n\t\t\t&variant.Attachment,\n\t\t\t&vCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&vUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif flag, ok := flagsByKey[variant.FlagKey.String]; ok {\n\t\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\tId:           variant.Id.String,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: variant.NamespaceKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          variant.Key.String,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variant.FlagKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tName:         variant.Name.String,\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  variant.Description.String,\n\t\t\t\tAttachment:   variant.Attachment.String,\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    vCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    vUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rows.Close()\n}\n\n// CountFlags counts all flags\nfunc (s *Store) CountFlags(ctx context.Context, p storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n\tvar count uint64\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace()}).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn count, nil\n}\n\n// CreateFlag creates a flag\nfunc (s *Store) CreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow  = flipt.Now()\n\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      r.Enabled,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"flags\").\n\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"\\\"type\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"enabled\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tflag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tflag.Key,\n\t\t\tflag.Type,\n\t\t\tflag.Name,\n\t\t\tflag.Description,\n\t\t\tflag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.UpdatedAt},\n\t\t).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn flag, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateFlag updates an existing flag\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"flags\").\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"enabled\", r.Enabled).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}})\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.GetFlag(ctx, p)\n}\n\n// DeleteFlag deletes a flag\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"flags\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// CreateVariant creates a variant\nfunc (s *Store) CreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow = flipt.Now()\n\t\tv   = &flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tAttachment:   r.Attachment,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tattachment := emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"variants\").\n\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"flag_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"attachment\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tv.Id,\n\t\t\tv.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tv.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tv.Key,\n\t\t\tv.Name,\n\t\t\tv.Description,\n\t\t\tattachment,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.UpdatedAt},\n\t\t).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif attachment != nil {\n\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(*attachment)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t}\n\n\treturn v, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateVariant updates an existing variant\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\twhereClause := sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"variants\").\n\t\tSet(\"\\\"key\\\"\", r.Key).\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"attachment\", emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(whereClause)\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"variant %q\", r.Key)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tattachment sql.NullString\n\t\tcreatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tv = &flipt.Variant{}\n\t)\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&v.Id, &v.NamespaceKey, &v.Key, &v.FlagKey, &v.Name, &v.Description, &attachment, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tv.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tv.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\tif attachment.Valid {\n\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t}\n\n\treturn v, nil\n}\n\n// DeleteVariant deletes a variant\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n",

\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\n// GetSegment gets a segment\nfunc (s *Store) GetSegment(ctx context.Context, req storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{}\n\n\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": req.Key}).\n\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\t\tScan(\n\t\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n\t)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", req)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tsegment.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tsegment.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": segment.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": segment.Key}}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn segment, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint           flipt.Constraint\n\t\t\tdescription          sql.NullString\n\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n\t\t\t&description,\n\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn segment, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconstraint.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\t\tconstraint.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tconstraint.Description = description.String\n\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &constraint)\n\t}\n\n\treturn segment, rows.Err()\n}\n\ntype optionalConstraint struct {\n\tId           sql.NullString\n\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n\tSegmentKey   sql.NullString\n\tType         sql.NullInt32\n\tProperty     sql.NullString\n\tOperator     sql.NullString\n\tValue        sql.NullString\n\tDescription  sql.NullString\n\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n}\n\n// ListSegments lists all segments\nfunc (s *Store) ListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tsegments []*flipt.Segment\n\t\tresults  = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment]{}\n\n\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n\t)\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// keep track of segments we've seen so we don't append duplicates because of the join\n\tsegmentsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Segment)\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tsegment    = &flipt.Segment{}\n\t\t\tsCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tsUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t&sCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&sUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsegment.CreatedAt = sCreatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tsegment.UpdatedAt = sUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\t\tsegments = append(segments, segment)\n\t\tsegmentsByKey[segment.Key] = segment\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.setConstraints(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), segmentsByKey); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar next *flipt.Segment\n\n\tif len(segments) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tnext = segments[len(segments)-1]\n\t\tsegments = segments[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n\t}\n\n\tresults.Results = segments\n\n\tif next != nil {\n\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(segments))})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n\t}\n\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Store) setConstraints(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, segmentsByKey map[string]*flipt.Segment) error {\n\tallSegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(segmentsByKey))\n\tfor k := range segmentsByKey {\n\t\tallSegmentKeys = append(allSegmentKeys, k)\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"segment_key\": allSegmentKeys}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint optionalConstraint\n\t\t\tcCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t\tcUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Description,\n\t\t\t&cCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&cUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif segment, ok := segmentsByKey[constraint.SegmentKey.String]; ok {\n\t\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\tId:           constraint.Id.String,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: constraint.NamespaceKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   constraint.SegmentKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType(constraint.Type.Int32),\n\t\t\t\tProperty:     constraint.Property.String,\n\t\t\t\tOperator:     constraint.Operator.String,\n\t\t\t\tValue:        constraint.Value.String,\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  constraint.Description.String,\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    cCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    cUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rows.Close()\n}\n\n// CountSegments counts all segments\nfunc (s *Store) CountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n\tvar count uint64\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": ns.Namespace()}).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn count, nil\n}\n\n// CreateSegment creates a segment\nfunc (s *Store) CreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow     = flipt.Now()\n\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tMatchType:    r.MatchType,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"segments\").\n\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"match_type\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tsegment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tsegment.Key,\n\t\t\tsegment.Name,\n\t\t\tsegment.Description,\n\t\t\tsegment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.UpdatedAt}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn segment, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateSegment updates an existing segment\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"segments\").\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"match_type\", r.MatchType).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey, \"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key})\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", p)\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.GetSegment(ctx, p)\n}\n\n// DeleteSegment deletes a segment\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"segments\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// CreateConstraint creates a constraint\nfunc (s *Store) CreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\toperator = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n\t\tnow      = flipt.Now()\n\t\tc        = &flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey:   r.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n\t\t\tProperty:     r.Property,\n\t\t\tOperator:     operator,\n\t\t\tValue:        r.Value,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[c.Operator]; ok {\n\t\tc.Value = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"constraints\").\n\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"segment_key\", \"type\", \"property\", \"operator\", \"value\", \"description\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tc.Id,\n\t\t\tc.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tc.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\tc.Type,\n\t\t\tc.Property,\n\t\t\tc.Operator,\n\t\t\tc.Value,\n\t\t\tc.Description,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.UpdatedAt}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateConstraint updates an existing constraint\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\twhereClause = sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n\t\toperator    = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n\t)\n\n\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[operator]; ok {\n\t\tr.Value = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tres, err := s.builder.Update(\"constraints\").\n\t\tSet(\"type\", r.Type).\n\t\tSet(\"property\", r.Property).\n\t\tSet(\"operator\", operator).\n\t\tSet(\"value\", r.Value).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"constraint %q\", r.Id)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tc = &flipt.Constraint{}\n\t)\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&c.Id, &c.NamespaceKey, &c.SegmentKey, &c.Type, &c.Property, &c.Operator, &c.Value, &c.Description, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tc.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tc.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// DeleteConstraint deletes a constraint\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n",

    "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil",

    "numLines": 200,
    "startLine": 1,

  },

err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go",
  "newString": "func (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))",
  "oldString": "func (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))",
  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " }",
        " ",
        " func (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {",
        "-  rollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))",
        "+  rollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))",

(s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
