  "originalFile": "package data\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\"\n\tgrpc_middleware \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/middleware/grpc\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n)\n\ntype EvaluationStore interface {\n\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n\tstorage.EvaluationStore\n}\n\ntype Server struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  EvaluationStore\n\n\tevaluation.UnimplementedDataServiceServer\n}\n\nfunc New(logger *zap.Logger, store EvaluationStore) *Server {\n\treturn &Server{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\n// RegisterGRPC registers the *Server onto the provided grpc Server.\nfunc (srv *Server) RegisterGRPC(server *grpc.Server) {\n\tevaluation.RegisterDataServiceServer(server, srv)\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationFlagType(f flipt.FlagType) evaluation.EvaluationFlagType {\n\tswitch f {\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s flipt.MatchType) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentOperator(s flipt.SegmentOperator) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c flipt.ComparisonType) evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n\tswitch c {\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationRolloutType(r flipt.RolloutType) evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType {\n\tswitch r {\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n}\n\nvar supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion = semver.MustParse(\"1.38.0\")\n\nfunc (srv *Server) EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) (*evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tnamespaceKey = r.Key\n\t\treference    = r.Reference\n\t\tresp         = &evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot{\n\t\t\tNamespace: &evaluation.EvaluationNamespace{ // TODO: should we get from store?\n\t\t\t\tKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tFlags: make([]*evaluation.EvaluationFlag, 0),\n\t\t}\n\t\tremaining              = true\n\t\tnextPage               string\n\t\tsegments               = make(map[string]*evaluation.EvaluationSegment)\n\t\tsupportedServerVersion = grpc_middleware.FliptAcceptServerVersionFromContext(ctx)\n\t)\n\n\t//  flags/variants in batches\n\tfor remaining {\n\t\tres, err := srv.store.ListFlags(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespaceKey, storage.WithReference(reference)),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(nextPage)),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting flags: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflags := res.Results\n\t\tnextPage = res.NextPageToken\n\t\tremaining = nextPage != \"\"\n\n\t\tfor _, f := range flags {\n\t\t\tflag := &evaluation.EvaluationFlag{\n\t\t\t\tKey:         f.Key,\n\t\t\t\tName:        f.Name,\n\t\t\t\tDescription: f.Description,\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:     f.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\tType:        toEvaluationFlagType(f.Type),\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:   f.CreatedAt,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:   f.UpdatedAt,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tflagKey := storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, f.Key, storage.WithReference(reference))\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trules, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rules {\n\t\t\t\t\trule := &evaluation.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tId:              r.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank:            r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif ss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss := &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdistributions, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(r.ID, storage.WithReference(reference)))\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting distributions for rule %q: %w\", r.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// distributions for rule\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdist := &evaluation.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantId:         d.VariantID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        d.VariantKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: d.VariantAttachment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRollout:           d.Rollout,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Distributions = append(rule.Distributions, dist)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rules = append(flag.Rules, rule)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trollouts, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rollout rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rollouts {\n\t\t\t\t\trollout := &evaluation.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType: toEvaluationRolloutType(r.RolloutType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank: r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch r.RolloutType {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: r.Threshold.Percentage,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      r.Threshold.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment := &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           r.Segment.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.Segment.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss = &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegment: segment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rollouts = append(flag.Rollouts, rollout)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Flags = append(resp.Flags, flag)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

    "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\ntype Evaluator struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  Storer\n}\n\n// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\nfunc NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n\treturn &Evaluator{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"variant\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastRank int32\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go",

  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\ntype Evaluator struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  Storer\n}\n\n// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\nfunc NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n\treturn &Evaluator{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"variant\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastRank int32\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n\n\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n\n\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n\t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n\t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n\t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetFlagRequest{Key: \"foo\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     req.Key,\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.GetFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", got.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, got.Enabled)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags_PaginationOffset(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n\t\tOffset: 10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(\"Zm9v\"),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t\tOffset:    10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"key\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = {
  "file": {
    "content": "\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdisabled := &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"foo\")).Return(enabledFlag, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"bar\")).Return(disabled, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId: \"12345\",\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Responses[0].Match)\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_NamespaceMismatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\t_, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey:    \"foo\",\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: true,\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"invalid field namespace_key: must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_FlagNotFoundExcluded(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdisabled := &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"foo\")).Return(enabledFlag, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"bar\")).Return(disabled, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"NotFoundFlag\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", \"NotFoundFlag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: true,\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"NotFoundFlag\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Responses[0].Match)\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_FlagNotFound(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: {
  "file": {
    "content": "\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleSegments_WithAnd(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"another-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"another-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\":      \"world\",\n\t\t\t\"pitimes100\": \"314\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation_test.go",

\"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"test-flag not found\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_NonVariantFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagDisabled(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      false,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.False(t, res.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_EvaluateFailure_OnGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(flag, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, errs.ErrInvalid(\"some invalid error\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"some invalid error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(flag, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Match)\n\tassert.Contains(t, res.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_FlagNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"test-flag not found\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_NonBooleanFlagError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRule_NoRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRuleFallthrough_WithPercentageRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 70,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleFallthrough_SegmentMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         2,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_Constraint_EntityId(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"entity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext:      map[string]string{},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleSegments_WithAnd(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"another-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"another-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\":      \"world\",\n\t\t\t\"pitimes100\": \"314\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         0,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rollout rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_UnknownFlagType(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tDescription: \"test-flag\",\n\t\tType:        3,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"unknown flag type: 3\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_InternalError_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.New(\"internal error\"))\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"internal error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey        = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tanotherFlagKey = \"another-test-flag\"\n\t\tvariantFlagKey = \"variant-test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey   = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore          = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger         = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts              = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      anotherFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, res.Responses, 3)\n\n\tb, ok := res.Responses[0].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a boolean evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, b.BooleanResponse.Enabled, \"value should be true from match\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, b.BooleanResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[0].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"1\", b.BooleanResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, b.BooleanResponse.FlagKey)\n\n\te, ok := res.Responses[1].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a error evaluation response\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, anotherFlagKey, e.ErrorResponse.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, namespaceKey, e.ErrorResponse.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, e.ErrorResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[1].Type)\n\n\tv, ok := res.Responses[2].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a variant evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, v.VariantResponse.Match, \"variant response should have matched\")\n\tassert.Contains(t, v.VariantResponse.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, v.VariantResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[2].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", v.VariantResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantFlagKey, v.VariantResponse.FlagKey)\n}\n",

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestSetHandleMarshalError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\tcachedStore.set(context.TODO(), \"key\", make(chan int))\n\tassert.Empty(t, cacher.cacheKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetHandleGetError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{getErr: errors.New(\"get error\")}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\tvalue := make(map[string]string)\n\tcacheHit := cachedStore.get(context.TODO(), \"key\", &value)\n\tassert.False(t, cacheHit)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetHandleUnmarshalError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcacher = &cacheSpy{\n\t\t\tcached:      true,\n\t\t\tcachedValue: []byte(`{\"invalid\":\"123\"`),\n\t\t}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\tvalue := make(map[string]string)\n\tcacheHit := cachedStore.get(context.TODO(), \"key\", &value)\n\tassert.False(t, cacheHit)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRules = []*storage.EvaluationRule{{ID: \"123\"}}\n\t\tstore         = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\")).Return(\n\t\texpectedRules, nil,\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trules, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRules, rules)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:er:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, []byte(`[{\"id\":\"123\"}]`), cacher.cachedValue)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRulesCached(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRules = []*storage.EvaluationRule{{Rank: 12}}\n\t\tstore         = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRules\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher = &cacheSpy{\n\t\t\tcached:      true,\n\t\t\tcachedValue: []byte(`[{\"rank\":12}]`),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trules, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRules, rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:er:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRollouts = []*storage.EvaluationRollout{{Rank: 1}}\n\t\tstore            = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\")).Return(\n\t\texpectedRollouts, nil,\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trollouts, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRollouts, rollouts)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:ero:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, []byte(`[{\"rank\":1}]`), cacher.cachedValue)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRolloutsCached(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRollouts = []*storage.EvaluationRollout{{Rank: 1}}\n\t\tstore            = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher = &cacheSpy{\n\t\t\tcached:      true,\n\t\t\tcachedValue: []byte(`[{\"rank\":1}]`),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trollouts, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRollouts, rollouts)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:ero:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/storage/cache/cache_test.go",
    "numLines": 150,
    "startLine": 1,
