(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tresource := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, resource).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetFlag(context.TODO(), resource)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](ns)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListFlags(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountFlags(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNS := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, defaultNS).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountFlags(context.TODO(), defaultNS)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNS := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetRule\", mock.Anything, defaultNS, \"rule\").Return(&flipt.Rule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetRule(context.TODO(), defaultNS, \"rule\")\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListRules\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rule]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListRules(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountRules\", mock.Anything, flag).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountRules(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetSegment(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tsegment := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"segment\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetSegment\", mock.Anything, segment).Return(&flipt.Segment{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetSegment(context.TODO(), segment)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListSegments\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListSegments(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNs := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountSegments\", mock.Anything, defaultNs).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountSegments(context.TODO(), defaultNs)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNs := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetRollout\", mock.Anything, defaultNs, \"rollout\").Return(&flipt.Rollout{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetRollout(context.TODO(), defaultNs, \"rollout\")\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListRollouts\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountRollouts\", mock.Anything, flag).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetNamespace(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetNamespace\", mock.Anything, ns).Return(&flipt.Namespace{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetNamespace(context.TODO(), ns)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListNamespaces(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlist := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.ReferenceRequest{},\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListNamespaces\", mock.Anything, list).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Namespace]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListNamespaces(context.TODO(), list)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountNamespaces(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tref := storage.ReferenceRequest{}\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountNamespaces\", mock.Anything, ref).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountNamespaces(context.TODO(), ref)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, flag).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tid := storage.NewID(\"id\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, id).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flag).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\ntype snapshotStoreMock struct {\n\t*common.StoreMock\n}\n\nfunc newSnapshotStoreMock() snapshotStoreMock {\n\treturn snapshotStoreMock{\n\t\tStoreMock: &common.StoreMock{},\n\t}\n}\n\n// View accepts a function which takes a *StoreSnapshot.\n// The SnapshotStore will supply a snapshot which is valid\n// for the lifetime of the provided function call.\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) View(_ context.Context, _ storage.Reference, fn func(storage.ReadOnlyStore) error) error {\n\treturn fn(s.StoreMock)\n}\n\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) String() string {\n\treturn \"mock\"\n}\n",

    "numLines": 241,
    "startLine": 1,

  },

69. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/storage/fs/git/store_test.go"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "package git\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/pem\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-billy/v5/memfs\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/object\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport/http\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/storage/memory\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/fs\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nvar gitRepoURL = os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_URL\")\n\nfunc Test_Store_String(t *testing.T) {\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"git\", (&SnapshotStore{}).String())\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_Subscribe_Hash(t *testing.T) {\n\thead := os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD\")\n\tif head == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// this helper will fail if there is a problem with this option\n\t// the only difference in behaviour is that the poll loop\n\t// will silently (intentionally) not run\n\ttestStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithRef(head))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n    - key: foo\n      name: Foo`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithRevision(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/new-branch\",\n\t\tCreate: true,\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n  - key: foo\n    name: Foo\n  - key: bar\n    name: Bar`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t\tRefSpecs:   []config.RefSpec{\"refs/heads/new-branch:refs/heads/new-branch\"},\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in default revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"main\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in explicitly named main revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"new-branch\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"flag should be present on new-branch\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithDirectory(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t),\n\t\t// scope flag state discovery to sub-directory\n\t\tWithDirectory(\"subdir\"),\n\t)\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"alternative\", \"otherflag\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedSkipTLS(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr := testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(false))\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(true))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedCABytes(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tpemCert := &pem.Block{\n\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n\t\tBytes: ts.Certificate().Raw,\n\t}\n\terr := pem.Encode(&buf, pemCert)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL)\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithCABundle(buf.Bytes()))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc testStore(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) (*SnapshotStore, bool) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tif gitRepoURL == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_URL env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn nil, true\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"Git repo host:\", gitRepoURL)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn source, false\n}\n\nfunc testStoreWithError(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) error {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/storage/fs/git/store_test.go",
    "numLines": 354,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 354
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "originalFile": "package fs\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tresource := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, resource).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetFlag(context.TODO(), resource)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](ns)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListFlags(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountFlags(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNS := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, defaultNS).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountFlags(context.TODO(), defaultNS)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNS := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetRule\", mock.Anything, defaultNS, \"rule\").Return(&flipt.Rule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetRule(context.TODO(), defaultNS, \"rule\")\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListRules\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rule]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListRules(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountRules\", mock.Anything, flag).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountRules(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetSegment(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tsegment := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"segment\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetSegment\", mock.Anything, segment).Return(&flipt.Segment{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetSegment(context.TODO(), segment)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListSegments\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListSegments(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNs := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountSegments\", mock.Anything, defaultNs).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountSegments(context.TODO(), defaultNs)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNs := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetRollout\", mock.Anything, defaultNs, \"rollout\").Return(&flipt.Rollout{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetRollout(context.TODO(), defaultNs, \"rollout\")\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListRollouts\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountRollouts\", mock.Anything, flag).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetNamespace(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetNamespace\", mock.Anything, ns).Return(&flipt.Namespace{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetNamespace(context.TODO(), ns)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListNamespaces(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlist := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.ReferenceRequest{},\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListNamespaces\", mock.Anything, list).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Namespace]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListNamespaces(context.TODO(), list)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountNamespaces(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tref := storage.ReferenceRequest{}\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountNamespaces\", mock.Anything, ref).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountNamespaces(context.TODO(), ref)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, flag).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tid := storage.NewID(\"id\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, id).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flag).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\ntype snapshotStoreMock struct {\n\t*common.StoreMock\n}\n\nfunc newSnapshotStoreMock() snapshotStoreMock {\n\treturn snapshotStoreMock{\n\t\tStoreMock: &common.StoreMock{},\n\t}\n}\n\n// View accepts a function which takes a *StoreSnapshot.\n// The SnapshotStore will supply a snapshot which is valid\n// for the lifetime of the provided function call.\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) View(_ context.Context, _ storage.Reference, fn func(storage.ReadOnlyStore) error) error {\n\treturn fn(s.StoreMock)\n}\n\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) String() string {\n\treturn \"mock\"\n}\n",

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/storage/fs/git/store_test.go",
  "newString": "storage.NewResource(ctx, \"production\", \"foo\")",
  "oldString": "storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\")",
  "originalFile": "package git\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/pem\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-billy/v5/memfs\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/object\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport/http\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/storage/memory\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/fs\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nvar gitRepoURL = os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_URL\")\n\nfunc Test_Store_String(t *testing.T) {\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"git\", (&SnapshotStore{}).String())\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_Subscribe_Hash(t *testing.T) {\n\thead := os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD\")\n\tif head == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// this helper will fail if there is a problem with this option\n\t// the only difference in behaviour is that the poll loop\n\t// will silently (intentionally) not run\n\ttestStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithRef(head))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n    - key: foo\n      name: Foo`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithRevision(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/new-branch\",\n\t\tCreate: true,\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n  - key: foo\n    name: Foo\n  - key: bar\n    name: Bar`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t\tRefSpecs:   []config.RefSpec{\"refs/heads/new-branch:refs/heads/new-branch\"},\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in default revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"main\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in explicitly named main revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"new-branch\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"flag should be present on new-branch\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithDirectory(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t),\n\t\t// scope flag state discovery to sub-directory\n\t\tWithDirectory(\"subdir\"),\n\t)\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"alternative\", \"otherflag\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedSkipTLS(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr := testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(false))\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(true))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedCABytes(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tpemCert := &pem.Block{\n\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n\t\tBytes: ts.Certificate().Raw,\n\t}\n\terr := pem.Encode(&buf, pemCert)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL)\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithCABundle(buf.Bytes()))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc testStore(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) (*SnapshotStore, bool) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tif gitRepoURL == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_URL env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn nil, true\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"Git repo host:\", gitRepoURL)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn source, false\n}\n\nfunc testStoreWithError(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) error {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package git\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/pem\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-billy/v5/memfs\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/object\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport/http\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/storage/memory\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/fs\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nvar gitRepoURL = os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_URL\")\n\nfunc Test_Store_String(t *testing.T) {\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"git\", (&SnapshotStore{}).String())\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_Subscribe_Hash(t *testing.T) {\n\thead := os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD\")\n\tif head == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// this helper will fail if there is a problem with this option\n\t// the only difference in behaviour is that the poll loop\n\t// will silently (intentionally) not run\n\ttestStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithRef(head))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n    - key: foo\n      name: Foo`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, \"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithRevision(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/new-branch\",\n\t\tCreate: true,\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n  - key: foo\n    name: Foo\n  - key: bar\n    name: Bar`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t\tRefSpecs:   []config.RefSpec{\"refs/heads/new-branch:refs/heads/new-branch\"},\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in default revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"main\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in explicitly named main revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"new-branch\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"flag should be present on new-branch\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithDirectory(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t),\n\t\t// scope flag state discovery to sub-directory\n\t\tWithDirectory(\"subdir\"),\n\t)\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"alternative\", \"otherflag\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedSkipTLS(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr := testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(false))\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(true))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedCABytes(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tpemCert := &pem.Block{\n\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n\t\tBytes: ts.Certificate().Raw,\n\t}\n\terr := pem.Encode(&buf, pemCert)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL)\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithCABundle(buf.Bytes()))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc testStore(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) (*SnapshotStore, bool) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tif gitRepoURL == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_URL env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn nil, true\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"Git repo host:\", gitRepoURL)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn source, false\n}\n\nfunc testStoreWithError(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) error {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n",
