  "originalFile": "package fs\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"embed\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io/fs\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/suite\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/core/validation\"\n\tflipterrors \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/ext\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\n//go:embed all:testdata\nvar testdata embed.FS\n\nfunc TestSnapshotFromFS_Invalid(t *testing.T) {\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tpath string\n\t\terr  error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath: \"testdata/invalid/extension\",\n\t\t\terr:  errors.New(\"unexpected extension: \\\".unknown\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath: \"testdata/invalid/variant_flag_segment\",\n\t\t\terr:  flipterrors.ErrInvalid(\"flag fruit/apple rule 1 references unknown segment \\\"unknown\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath: \"testdata/invalid/variant_flag_distribution\",\n\t\t\terr:  flipterrors.ErrInvalid(\"flag fruit/apple rule 1 references unknown variant \\\"braeburn\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath: \"testdata/invalid/boolean_flag_segment\",\n\t\t\terr:  flipterrors.ErrInvalid(\"flag fruit/apple rule 1 references unknown segment \\\"unknown\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath: \"testdata/invalid/namespace\",\n\t\t\terr: errors.Join(\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: 2 errors in empty disjunction:\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: conflicting values 1 and \\\"default\\\" (mismatched types int and string)\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t\tvalidation.Error{Message: \"namespace: conflicting values 1 and string (mismatched types int and string)\", Location: validation.Location{File: \"features.json\", Line: 1}},\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.path, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tdir, err := fs.Sub(testdata, test.path)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t_, err = SnapshotFromFS(zaptest.NewLogger(t), dir)\n\t\t\tif !assert.Equal(t, test.err, err) {\n\t\t\t\tfmt.Println(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n}\n\nfunc TestWalkDocuments(t *testing.T) {\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tpath  string\n\t\tcount int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/explicit_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 2,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/implicit_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 6,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tpath:  \"testdata/valid/exclude_index\",\n\t\t\tcount: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.path, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tsrc, err := fs.Sub(testdata, test.path)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tvar docs []*ext.Document\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, WalkDocuments(zaptest.NewLogger(t), src, func(d *ext.Document) error {\n\t\t\t\tdocs = append(docs, d)\n\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t}))\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, docs, test.count)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestFSWithIndex(t *testing.T) {\n\tfwi, _ := fs.Sub(testdata, \"testdata/valid/explicit_index\")\n\n\tss, err := SnapshotFromFS(zaptest.NewLogger(t), fwi)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttfs := &FSIndexSuite{\n\t\tstore: ss,\n\t}\n\n\tsuite.Run(t, tfs)\n}\n\ntype FSIndexSuite struct {\n\tsuite.Suite\n\tstore storage.ReadOnlyStore\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestCountFlag() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tflagCount, err := fis.store.CountFlags(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"production\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 12, int(flagCount))\n\n\tflagCount, err = fis.store.CountFlags(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"sandbox\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 12, int(flagCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestGetFlag() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t\tflag      *flipt.Flag\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Prod Flag\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"prod-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Prod Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Sandbox Flag\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"sandbox-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Sandbox Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tflag, err := fis.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.Key, flag.Key)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.NamespaceKey, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.Name, flag.Name)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.Description, flag.Description)\n\n\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(flag.Variants); i++ {\n\t\t\t\tv := tc.flag.Variants[i]\n\t\t\t\tfv := flag.Variants[i]\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.NamespaceKey, fv.NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.Key, fv.Key)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.Name, fv.Name)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.Description, fv.Description)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestListFlags() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tflags, err := fis.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithLimit(5), storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken)),\n\t\t\t))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, flags.Results, 5)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"5\", flags.NextPageToken)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestGetNamespace() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tnamespaceKey string\n\t\tfliptNs      *flipt.Namespace\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"production\",\n\t\t\tnamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\tfliptNs: &flipt.Namespace{\n\t\t\t\tKey:  \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"production\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tfliptNs: &flipt.Namespace{\n\t\t\t\tKey:  \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tns, err := fis.store.GetNamespace(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespaceKey))\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.fliptNs.Key, ns.Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.fliptNs.Name, ns.Name)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, ns.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, ns.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestCountNamespaces() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tnamespacesCount, err := fis.store.CountNamespaces(context.TODO(), storage.ReferenceRequest{})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 3, int(namespacesCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestListNamespaces() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tnamespaces, err := fis.store.ListNamespaces(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.ReferenceRequest{},\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ReferenceRequest](storage.WithLimit(2), storage.WithPageToken(\"0\"))))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, namespaces.Results, 2)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"2\", namespaces.NextPageToken)\n\n\tfor _, ns := range namespaces.Results {\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, ns.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, ns.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestGetSegment() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tnamespace  string\n\t\tsegmentKey string\n\t\tsegment    *flipt.Segment\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"production\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment1\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment1\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tsgmt, err := fis.store.GetSegment(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.segmentKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.segment.Key, sgmt.Key)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.segment.Name, sgmt.Name)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.segment.NamespaceKey, sgmt.NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(tc.segment.Constraints); i++ {\n\t\t\t\tc := tc.segment.Constraints[i]\n\t\t\t\tfc := sgmt.Constraints[i]\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.SegmentKey, fc.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Property, fc.Property)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Operator, fc.Operator)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Value, fc.Value)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Description, fc.Description)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.NamespaceKey, fc.NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestListSegments() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"0\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"0\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tflags, err := fis.store.ListSegments(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithLimit(5), storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken)),\n\t\t\t))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, flags.Results, 5)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"5\", flags.NextPageToken)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestCountSegment() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tsegmentCount, err := fis.store.CountSegments(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"production\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 11, int(segmentCount))\n\n\tsegmentCount, err = fis.store.CountSegments(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"sandbox\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 11, int(segmentCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestGetEvaluationRollouts() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trollouts, err := fis.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, rollouts, 2)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.namespace, rollouts[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rollouts[0].Rank)\n\n\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, rollouts[0].Segment)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, rollouts[0].Segment.Segments, \"segment1\")\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, rollouts[0].Segment.Value, \"segment value should be true\")\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.namespace, rollouts[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), rollouts[1].Rank)\n\n\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, rollouts[1].Threshold)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(50), rollouts[1].Threshold.Percentage)\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, rollouts[1].Threshold.Value, \"threshold value should be true\")\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestGetEvaluationRules() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname        string\n\t\tnamespace   string\n\t\tflagKey     string\n\t\tconstraints []*flipt.Constraint\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tconstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\tconstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trules, err := fis.store.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, rules, 1)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.namespace, rules[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flagKey, rules[0].FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rules[0].Rank)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, rules[0].Segments, \"segment1\")\n\n\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(tc.constraints); i++ {\n\t\t\t\tfc := tc.constraints[i]\n\t\t\t\tc := rules[0].Segments[fc.SegmentKey].Constraints[i]\n\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Type, c.Type)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Property, c.Property)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Operator, c.Operator)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Value, c.Value)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestGetEvaluationDistributions() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname                string\n\t\tnamespace           string\n\t\tflagKey             string\n\t\texpectedVariantName string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:           \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:             \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\texpectedVariantName: \"sandbox-variant\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:           \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:             \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\texpectedVariantName: \"prod-variant\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trules, err := fis.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey)))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, rules.Results, 1)\n\n\t\t\tdist, err := fis.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), storage.NewID(rules.Results[0].Id))\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.expectedVariantName, dist[0].VariantKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100), dist[0].Rollout)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestCountRollouts() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\trolloutsCount, err := fis.store.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"flag_boolean\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, int(rolloutsCount))\n\n\trolloutsCount, err = fis.store.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"sandbox\", \"flag_boolean\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, int(rolloutsCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestListAndGetRollouts() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trollouts, err := fis.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken))))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts.Results {\n\t\t\t\tr, err := fis.store.GetRollout(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace), rollout.Id)\n\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, r, rollout)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestListAndGetRules() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trules, err := fis.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken))))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tfor _, rule := range rules.Results {\n\t\t\t\tr, err := fis.store.GetRule(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace), rule.Id)\n\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, r, rule)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSIndexSuite) TestCountRules() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t\tcount     uint64\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tcount:     1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\tcount:     1,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tcount, err := fis.store.CountRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.count, count)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\ntype FSWithoutIndexSuite struct {\n\tsuite.Suite\n\tstore storage.ReadOnlyStore\n}\n\nfunc TestFSWithoutIndex(t *testing.T) {\n\tfwoi, _ := fs.Sub(testdata, \"testdata/valid/implicit_index\")\n\n\tss, err := SnapshotFromFS(zaptest.NewLogger(t), fwoi)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttfs := &FSWithoutIndexSuite{\n\t\tstore: ss,\n\t}\n\n\tsuite.Run(t, tfs)\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestCountFlag() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tflagCount, err := fis.store.CountFlags(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"production\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 14, int(flagCount))\n\n\tflagCount, err = fis.store.CountFlags(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"sandbox\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 14, int(flagCount))\n\n\tflagCount, err = fis.store.CountFlags(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"staging\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 14, int(flagCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestGetFlag() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t\tflag      *flipt.Flag\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Prod Flag\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"prod-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Prod Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production One\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag-1\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"prod-flag-1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Prod Flag 1\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"prod-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Prod Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Sandbox Flag\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"sandbox-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Sandbox Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox One\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag-1\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"sandbox-flag-1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Sandbox Flag 1\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"sandbox-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Sandbox Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"staging-flag\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"staging-flag\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Staging Flag\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"staging-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Staging Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging One\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"staging-flag-1\",\n\t\t\tflag: &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"staging-flag-1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"Staging Flag 1\",\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"description\",\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\t\tVariants: []*flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"staging-variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:         \"Staging Variant\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tflag, err := fis.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.Key, flag.Key)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.NamespaceKey, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.Name, flag.Name)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flag.Description, flag.Description)\n\n\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(flag.Variants); i++ {\n\t\t\t\tv := tc.flag.Variants[i]\n\t\t\t\tfv := flag.Variants[i]\n\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.NamespaceKey, fv.NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.Key, fv.Key)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.Name, fv.Name)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, v.Description, fv.Description)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestListFlags() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tflags, err := fis.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithLimit(5), storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken))))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, flags.Results, 5)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"5\", flags.NextPageToken)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestGetNamespace() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tnamespaceKey string\n\t\tfliptNs      *flipt.Namespace\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"production\",\n\t\t\tnamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\tfliptNs: &flipt.Namespace{\n\t\t\t\tKey:  \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"production\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tfliptNs: &flipt.Namespace{\n\t\t\t\tKey:  \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\tfliptNs: &flipt.Namespace{\n\t\t\t\tKey:  \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tns, err := fis.store.GetNamespace(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespaceKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.fliptNs.Key, ns.Key)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.fliptNs.Name, ns.Name)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestCountNamespaces() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tnamespacesCount, err := fis.store.CountNamespaces(context.TODO(), storage.ReferenceRequest{})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 4, int(namespacesCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestListNamespaces() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tnamespaces, err := fis.store.ListNamespaces(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.ReferenceRequest{},\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ReferenceRequest](storage.WithLimit(3), storage.WithPageToken(\"0\"))))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, namespaces.Results, 3)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", namespaces.NextPageToken)\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestGetSegment() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tnamespace  string\n\t\tsegmentKey string\n\t\tsegment    *flipt.Segment\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"production\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment1\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Production One\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"production\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment2\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment1\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Sandbox One\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment2\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"staging\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment1\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"Staging One\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:  \"staging\",\n\t\t\tsegmentKey: \"segment2\",\n\t\t\tsegment: &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\tKey:          \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\tName:         \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\tMatchType:    flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\tConstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDescription:  \"desc\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tsgmt, err := fis.store.GetSegment(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.segmentKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.segment.Key, sgmt.Key)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.segment.Name, sgmt.Name)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.segment.NamespaceKey, sgmt.NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(tc.segment.Constraints); i++ {\n\t\t\t\tc := tc.segment.Constraints[i]\n\t\t\t\tfc := sgmt.Constraints[i]\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.SegmentKey, fc.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Property, fc.Property)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Operator, fc.Operator)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Value, fc.Value)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.Description, fc.Description)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, c.NamespaceKey, fc.NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestCountSegment() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\tsegmentCount, err := fis.store.CountSegments(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"production\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 12, int(segmentCount))\n\n\tsegmentCount, err = fis.store.CountSegments(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"sandbox\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 12, int(segmentCount))\n\n\tsegmentCount, err = fis.store.CountSegments(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"staging\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 12, int(segmentCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestListSegments() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tflags, err := fis.store.ListSegments(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithLimit(5), storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken))))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, flags.Results, 5)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"5\", flags.NextPageToken)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestGetEvaluationRollouts() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trollouts, err := fis.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, rollouts, 2)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.namespace, rollouts[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rollouts[0].Rank)\n\n\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, rollouts[0].Segment)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, rollouts[0].Segment.Segments, \"segment1\")\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, rollouts[0].Segment.Value, \"segment value should be true\")\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.namespace, rollouts[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(2), rollouts[1].Rank)\n\n\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, rollouts[1].Threshold)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(50), rollouts[1].Threshold.Percentage)\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, rollouts[1].Threshold.Value, \"threshold value should be true\")\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestGetEvaluationRules() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname        string\n\t\tnamespace   string\n\t\tflagKey     string\n\t\tconstraints []*flipt.Constraint\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tconstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"production\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\tconstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"staging-flag\",\n\t\t\tconstraints: []*flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   \"segment1\",\n\t\t\t\t\tProperty:     \"fizz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tOperator:     \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:        \"buzz\",\n\t\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"staging\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trules, err := fis.store.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, rules, 1)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.namespace, rules[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.flagKey, rules[0].FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), rules[0].Rank)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, rules[0].Segments, \"segment1\")\n\n\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(tc.constraints); i++ {\n\t\t\t\tfc := tc.constraints[i]\n\t\t\t\tc := rules[0].Segments[fc.SegmentKey].Constraints[i]\n\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Type, c.Type)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Property, c.Property)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Operator, c.Operator)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, fc.Value, c.Value)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestGetEvaluationDistributions() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname                string\n\t\tnamespace           string\n\t\tflagKey             string\n\t\texpectedVariantName string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:           \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:             \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\texpectedVariantName: \"prod-variant\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:           \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:             \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t\texpectedVariantName: \"sandbox-variant\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace:           \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:             \"staging-flag\",\n\t\t\texpectedVariantName: \"staging-variant\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trules, err := fis.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey)))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, rules.Results, 1)\n\n\t\t\tdist, err := fis.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), storage.NewID(rules.Results[0].Id))\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, tc.expectedVariantName, dist[0].VariantKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, float32(100), dist[0].Rollout)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestCountRollouts() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\trolloutsCount, err := fis.store.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"flag_boolean\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, int(rolloutsCount))\n\n\trolloutsCount, err = fis.store.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"sandbox\", \"flag_boolean\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, int(rolloutsCount))\n\n\trolloutsCount, err = fis.store.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"staging\", \"flag_boolean\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, int(rolloutsCount))\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestListAndGetRollouts() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"flag_boolean\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trollouts, err := fis.store.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken))))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts.Results {\n\t\t\t\tr, err := fis.store.GetRollout(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace), rollout.Id)\n\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, r, rollout)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (fis *FSWithoutIndexSuite) TestListAndGetRules() {\n\tt := fis.T()\n\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tnamespace string\n\t\tflagKey   string\n\t\tpageToken string\n\t\tlistError error\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Production\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Sandbox\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"sandbox\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"sandbox-flag\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Staging\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"staging\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"staging-flag\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Page Token Invalid\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"foo\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"pageToken is not valid: \\\"foo\\\"\"),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Invalid Offset\",\n\t\t\tnamespace: \"production\",\n\t\t\tflagKey:   \"prod-flag\",\n\t\t\tpageToken: \"60000\",\n\t\t\tlistError: errors.New(\"invalid offset: 60000\"),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\trules, err := fis.store.ListRules(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(tc.namespace, tc.flagKey),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(tc.pageToken))))\n\t\t\tif tc.listError != nil {\n\t\t\t\tassert.EqualError(t, err, tc.listError.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tfor _, rule := range rules.Results {\n\t\t\t\tr, err := fis.store.GetRule(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(tc.namespace), rule.Id)\n\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, r, rule)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestFS_Empty_Features_File(t *testing.T) {\n\tfs, _ := fs.Sub(testdata, \"testdata/valid/empty_features\")\n\tss, err := SnapshotFromFS(zaptest.NewLogger(t), fs)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tdefaultList := storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace))\n\t_, err = ss.ListFlags(context.TODO(), defaultList)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = ss.ListSegments(context.TODO(), defaultList)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tdefaultListByFlag := storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, \"no-flag\"))\n\t_, err = ss.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), defaultListByFlag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = ss.ListRules(context.TODO(), defaultListByFlag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestFS_YAML_Stream(t *testing.T) {\n\tfs, _ := fs.Sub(testdata, \"testdata/valid/yaml_stream\")\n\tss, err := SnapshotFromFS(zaptest.NewLogger(t), fs)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tns, err := ss.ListNamespaces(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.ReferenceRequest{}))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// 3 namespaces including default\n\tassert.Len(t, ns.Results, 3)\n\tvar namespaces = make([]string, 0, len(ns.Results))\n\n\tfor _, n := range ns.Results {\n\t\tnamespaces = append(namespaces, n.Key)\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, namespace := range []string{\"default\", \"football\", \"fruit\"} {\n\t\tassert.Contains(t, namespaces, namespace)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tlistFootball = storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"football\"))\n\t\tlistFruit    = storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"fruit\"))\n\t)\n\tfflags, err := ss.ListFlags(context.TODO(), listFootball)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, fflags.Results, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"team\", fflags.Results[0].Key)\n\n\tfrflags, err := ss.ListFlags(context.TODO(), listFruit)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, frflags.Results, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"apple\", frflags.Results[0].Key)\n\n\tfsegments, err := ss.ListSegments(context.TODO(), listFootball)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, fsegments.Results, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"internal\", fsegments.Results[0].Key)\n\n\tfrsegments, err := ss.ListSegments(context.TODO(), listFruit)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, frsegments.Results, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"internal\", frsegments.Results[0].Key)\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tvar resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\n\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:    r.RequestId,\n\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     r.EntityId,\n\t\tContext:      r.Context,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t}\n\n\tif resp != nil {\n\t\tspanAttrs = append(spanAttrs,\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.Value),\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// BatchEvaluate evaluates a request for multiple flags and entities\nfunc (s *Server) BatchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.batchEvaluate(ctx, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) batchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tres := flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*flipt.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(r.GetRequests())),\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should change this to a native batch query instead of looping through\n\t// each request individually\n\tfor _, req := range r.GetRequests() {\n\t\t// ensure all requests have the same namespace\n\t\tif req.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\t\treq.NamespaceKey = r.NamespaceKey\n\t\t} else if req.NamespaceKey != r.NamespaceKey {\n\t\t\treturn &res, errs.InvalidFieldError(\"namespace_key\", \"must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif r.GetExcludeNotFound() && errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// TODO: we also need to validate each request, we should likely do this in the validation middleware\n\t\tf, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\tRequestId:    req.RequestId,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tEntityId:     req.EntityId,\n\t\t\tContext:      req.Context,\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Error(\"error evaluating flag\", zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tf.RequestId = \"\"\n\t\tres.Responses = append(res.Responses, f)\n\t}\n\n\treturn &res, nil\n}\n",

88. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/storage/storage.go",
  "limit": 20,
  "offset": 416
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "\n// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ctx context.Context, ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}\n\n// String returns a representation of the combined resource namespace and key separated by a '/'.\nfunc (p ResourceRequest) String() string {\n\treturn path.Join(p.Namespace(), p.Key)\n}",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/storage/storage.go",
    "numLines": 20,
    "startLine": 416,
    "totalLines": 451
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagNotFound(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"test-flag not found\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_NonVariantFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagDisabled(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      false,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.False(t, res.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_EvaluateFailure_OnGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType: nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, errs.ErrInvalid(\"some invalid error\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"some invalid error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(flag, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue: storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Match)\n\tassert.Contains(t, res.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_FlagNotFoundError(t *testing.T)
