nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRule_NoRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRuleFallthrough_WithPercentageRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 70,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleFallthrough_SegmentMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         2,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_Constraint_EntityId(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"entity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext:      map[string]string{},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleSegments_WithAnd(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"another-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"another-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\":      \"world\",\n\t\t\t\"pitimes100\": \"314\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         0,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rollout rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_UnknownFlagType(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tDescription: \"test-flag\",\n\t\tType:        3,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"unknown flag type: 3\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_InternalError_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.New(\"internal error\"))\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"internal error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey        = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tanotherFlagKey = \"another-test-flag\"\n\t\tvariantFlagKey = \"variant-test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey   = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore          = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger         = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts              = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      anotherFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, res.Responses, 3)\n\n\tb, ok := res.Responses[0].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a boolean evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, b.BooleanResponse.Enabled, \"value should be true from match\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, b.BooleanResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[0].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"1\", b.BooleanResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, b.BooleanResponse.FlagKey)\n\n\te, ok := res.Responses[1].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a error evaluation response\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, anotherFlagKey, e.ErrorResponse.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, namespaceKey, e.ErrorResponse.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, e.ErrorResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[1].Type)\n\n\tv, ok := res.Responses[2].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a variant evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, v.VariantResponse.Match, \"variant response should have matched\")\n\tassert.Contains(t, v.VariantResponse.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, v.VariantResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[2].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", v.VariantResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantFlagKey, v.VariantResponse.FlagKey)\n}\n",

&storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         0,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rollout rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_UnknownFlagType(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"unknown flag type: 3\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_InternalError_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.New(\"internal error\"))\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"internal error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey        = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tanotherFlagKey = \"another-test-flag\"\n\t\tvariantFlagKey = \"variant-test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey   = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore          = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger         = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts              = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      anotherFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, res.Responses, 3)\n\n\tb, ok := res.Responses[0].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a boolean evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, b.BooleanResponse.Enabled, \"value should be true from match\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, b.BooleanResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[0].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"1\", b.BooleanResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, b.BooleanResponse.FlagKey)\n\n\te, ok := res.Responses[1].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a error evaluation response\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, anotherFlagKey, e.ErrorResponse.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, namespaceKey, e.ErrorResponse.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, e.ErrorResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[1].Type)\n\n\tv, ok := res.Responses[2].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a variant evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, v.VariantResponse.Match, \"variant response should have matched\")\n\tassert.Contains(t, v.VariantResponse.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, v.VariantResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[2].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", v.VariantResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantFlagKey, v.VariantResponse.FlagKey)\n}\n",

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetRolloutRequest{Id: \"id\", FlagKey: \"flagKey\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetRollout\", mock.Anything, storage.NewNamespace(\"\"), \"id\").Return(&flipt.Rollout{\n\t\tId: \"1\",\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.GetRollout(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRollouts_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(\"Zm9v\"),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRolloutRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tname string\n\t\treq  *flipt.CreateRolloutRequest\n\t\tresp *flipt.Rollout\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"segment\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:      \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"segments\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"threshold\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tstore.On(\"CreateRollout\", mock.Anything, test.req).Return(test.resp, nil)\n\n\t\t\tgot, err := s.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), test.req)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, test.resp, got)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tRule: &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateRollout\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rollout{\n\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey: req.FlagKey,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Test_matchesNumber(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tconstraint storage.EvaluationConstraint\n\t\tvalue      string\n\t\twantMatch of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[3, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"3.14159\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"9\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is one of (non-number values)\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, \\\"str\\\"]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"5\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is not one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"3\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is not one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"3.14159\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: false,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is not one of (invalid json)\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 6\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"5\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint = tt.constraint\n\t\t\tvalue      = tt.value\n\t\t\twantMatch  = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t\twantErr    = tt.wantErr\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmatch, err := matchesNumber(constraint, value)\n\n\t\t\tif wantErr {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tvar ierr ferrors.ErrInvalid\n\t\t\t\tassert.ErrorAs(t, err, &ierr)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantMatch, match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Test_matchesBool(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tconstraint storage.EvaluationConstraint\n\t\tvalue      string\n\t\twantMatch  bool\n\t\twantErr    bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"true\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative notpresent\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not a bool\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"true\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is true\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"true\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"true\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is true\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"true\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"false\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is false\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"false\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"false\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is false\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"false\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"empty value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"false\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"unknown operator\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint = tt.constraint\n\t\t\tvalue      = tt.value\n\t\t\twantMatch  = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t\twantErr    = tt.wantErr\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmatch, err := matchesBool(constraint, value)\n\n\t\t\tif wantErr {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tvar ierr ferrors.ErrInvalid\n\t\t\t\tassert.ErrorAs(t, err, &ierr)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantMatch, match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Test_matchesDateTime(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tconstraint storage.EvaluationConstraint\n\t\tvalue      string\n\t\twantMatch  bool\n\t\twantErr    bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative notpresent\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not a datetime constraint value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not a datetime context value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"eq date only\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative neq date only\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"lt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2005-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative lt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2005-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"lte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative lte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"gt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative gt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"gte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative gte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2005-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"empty value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"unknown operator\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint = tt.constraint\n\t\t\tvalue      = tt.value\n\t\t\twantMatch  = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t\twantErr    = tt.wantErr\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmatch, err := matchesDateTime(constraint, value)\n\n\t\t\tif wantErr {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tvar ierr ferrors.ErrInvalid\n\t\t\t\tassert.ErrorAs(t, err, &ierr)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantMatch, match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nvar (\n\tenabledFlag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}\n\tdisabledFlag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_FlagDisabled(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), disabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_NonVariantFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\tType:    flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_FlagNoRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorGettingRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, errors.New(\"error getting rules!\"))\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rule rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorParsingNumber(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorParsingDateTime(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue: flipt.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorGettingDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger =
