[]storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, errors.New(\"error getting distributions!\"))\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\n// Match ALL constraints\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_NoVariants_NoDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_MultipleSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:              \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:            0,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"company\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"flipt\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":     \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"company\": \"flipt\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey, \"segment key should be empty\")\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, resp.SegmentKeys, 2)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, resp.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, resp.SegmentKeys, \"foo\")\n\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_DistributionNotMatched(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           10,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: \"123\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match, \"distribution not matched\")\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_SingleVariantDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value\"}`, resp.Attachment)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_RolloutDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_RolloutDistribution_MultiRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"subscribers\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"subscribers\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: premium_user (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"premium_user\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"all_users\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"all_users\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"released\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"unreleased\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"premium_user\": \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"subscribers\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_NoConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"10\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Match ANY constraints\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_NoVariants_NoDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_SingleVariantDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches one\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no matches wrong bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"false\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no matches wrong string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match none\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"boss\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_RolloutDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_RolloutDistribution_MultiRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"subscribers\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"subscribers\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: premium_user (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"premium_user\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"all_users\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"all_users\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: premium_user (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"premium_user\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"released\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"unreleased\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"premium_user\": \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"subscribers\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchEntityId(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"subscribers\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"subscribers\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"entity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"released\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"unreleased\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"subscribers\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_NoConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"10\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Since we skip rollout buckets that have 0% distribution, ensure that things still work\n// when a 0% distribution is the first available one.\nfunc TestEvaluator_FirstRolloutRuleIsZero(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Ensure things work properly when many rollout distributions have a 0% value.\nfunc TestEvaluator_MultipleZeroRolloutDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"3\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package grpc_middleware\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/cache/memory\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/authn/method/token\"\n\tauthmiddlewaregrpc \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/authn/middleware/grpc\"\n\tservereval \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\tsdktrace \"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n\n\t\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\tstorageauth \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/authn\"\n\tauthrpc \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/auth\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc/codes\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc/metadata\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc/status\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/timestamppb\"\n)\n\ntype validatable struct {\n\terr error\n}\n\nfunc (v *validatable) Validate() error {\n\treturn v.err\n}\n\nfunc TestValidationUnaryInterceptor(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\treq        interface{}\n\t\twantCalled int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"does not implement Validate\",\n\t\t\treq:        struct{}{},\n\t\t\twantCalled: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"implements validate no error\",\n\t\t\treq:        &validatable{},\n\t\t\twantCalled: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"implements validate error\",\n\t\t\treq:  &validatable{err: errors.New(\"invalid\")},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq        = tt.req\n\t\t\twantCalled = tt.wantCalled\n\t\t\tcalled     int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tspyHandler = grpc.UnaryHandler(func(ctx context.Context, req interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcalled++\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\t_, _ = ValidationUnaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, nil, spyHandler)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantCalled, called)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestErrorUnaryInterceptor(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname     string\n\t\twantErr  error\n\t\twantCode codes.Code\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"not found error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.ErrNotFound(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.NotFound,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"deadline exceeded error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  fmt.Errorf(\"foo: %w\", context.DeadlineExceeded),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.DeadlineExceeded,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"context cancelled error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  fmt.Errorf(\"foo: %w\", context.Canceled),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.Canceled,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"invalid error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.ErrInvalid(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.InvalidArgument,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"invalid field\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.InvalidFieldError(\"bar\", \"is wrong\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.InvalidArgument,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"empty field\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.EmptyFieldError(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.InvalidArgument,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"unauthenticated error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.NewErrorf[errors.ErrUnauthenticated](\"user %q not found\", \"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.Unauthenticated,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"other error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.New(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.Internal,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no error\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\twantErr  = tt.wantErr\n\t\t\twantCode = tt.wantCode\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tspyHandler = grpc.UnaryHandler(func(ctx context.Context, req interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, wantErr\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\t_, err := ErrorUnaryInterceptor(context.Background(), nil, nil, spyHandler)\n\t\t\tif wantErr != nil {\n\t\t\t\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tstatus := status.Convert(err)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantCode, status.Code())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluationUnaryInterceptor_Noop(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\thandler = func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\treturn &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t}, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tinfo = &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tgot, err := EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(false)(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tresp, ok := got.(*flipt.Flag)\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.Key)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluationUnaryInterceptor_Evaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\ttype request interface {\n\t\tGetRequestId() string\n\t}\n\n\ttype response interface {\n\t\trequest\n\t\tGetTimestamp() *timestamppb.Timestamp\n\t\tGetRequestDurationMillis() float64\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\trequestID string\n\t\treq       request\n\t\tresp      response\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"flipt.EvaluationRequest without request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"flipt.EvaluationRequest with request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"bar\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRequestId: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Variant evaluation.EvaluationRequest without request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: &evaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Boolean evaluation.EvaluationRequest with request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"baz\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRequestId: \"baz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: &evaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\thandler = func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\t// ensure request has ID once it reaches the handler\n\t\t\t\t\treq, ok := r.(request)\n\t\t\t\t\trequire.True(t, ok)\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif test.requestID == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, req.GetRequestId())\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn test.resp, nil\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, test.requestID, req.GetRequestId())\n\n\t\t\t\t\treturn test.resp, nil\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tinfo = &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\t\t\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tgot, err := EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(true)(context.Background(), test.req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp, ok := got.(response)\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\n\t\t\t// check that the requestID is either non-empty\n\t\t\t// or explicitly what was provided for the test\n\t\t\tif test.requestID == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.GetRequestId())\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, test.requestID, resp.GetRequestId())\n\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NotZero(t, resp.GetTimestamp())\n\t\t\tassert.NotZero(t, resp.GetRequestDurationMillis())\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluationUnaryInterceptor_BatchEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\treq = &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\thandler = func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\treturn &flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tResponses: []*flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tinfo = &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tgot, err := EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(false)(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tresp, ok := got.(*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.Responses[0].FlagKey)\n\t// check that the requestID was created and set\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.RequestId)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, resp.RequestDurationMillis)\n\n\treq = &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId: \"bar\",\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err = EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(false)(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tresp, ok = got.(*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.Responses[0].FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.Responses[0].Timestamp)\n\t// check that the requestID was propagated\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.RequestId)\n\n\t// TODO(yquansah): flakey assertion\n\t// assert.NotZero(t, resp.RequestDurationMillis)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: flipt.DefaultNamespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.GetFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.GetFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\treq := &flipt.GetFlagRequest{Key: \"foo\"}\n\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\t}\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 10, cacheSpy.getCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys)\n\n\tconst cacheKey = \"f:foo\"\n\t_, ok := cacheSpy.getKeys[cacheKey]\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.setCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.setItems)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.setItems[cacheKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_UpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.UpdateFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.UpdateFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_DeleteFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"key\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.DeleteFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.DeleteFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_CreateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n\t\tId:          \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.CreateVariant(ctx, r.(*flipt.CreateVariantRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_UpdateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tId:          \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n\t\tId:          req.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.UpdateVariant(ctx, r.(*flipt.UpdateVariantRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_DeleteVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tId: \"1\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.DeleteVariant(ctx, r.(*flipt.DeleteVariantRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_Evaluate(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *flipt.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.Evaluate(ctx, r.(*flipt.EvaluationRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\ti         = i + 1\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp := got.(*flipt.EvaluationResponse)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, i, cacheSpy.getCalled)\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value\"}`, resp.Attachment)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_Evaluation_Variant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = servereval.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.Variant(ctx, r.(*evaluation.EvaluationRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\ti         = i + 1\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp := got.(*evaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, i, cacheSpy.getCalled, \"cache get wasn't called as expected\")\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys, \"cache keys should not be empty\")\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, resp.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.VariantKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value\"}`, resp.VariantAttachment)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_Evaluation_Boolean(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = servereval.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t\tType:    flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRolloutType: flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tValue: true,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tRank: 1,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.Boolean(ctx, r.(*evaluation.EvaluationRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\ti         = i + 1\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp := got.(*evaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, i, cacheSpy.getCalled, \"cache get wasn't called as expected\")\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys, \"cache keys should not be empty\")\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Enabled)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, evaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Enabled)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, evaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\ntype checkerDummy struct{}\n\nfunc (c *checkerDummy) Check(e string) bool {\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_CreateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\texporterSpy = newAuditExporterSpy(logger)\n\t\ts           = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq         = &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.CreateFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.CreateFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"CreateFlag\",\n\t}\n\n\ttp := sdktrace.NewTracerProvider(sdktrace.WithSampler(sdktrace.AlwaysSample()))\n\ttp.RegisterSpanProcessor(sdktrace.NewSimpleSpanProcessor(exporterSpy))\n\n\ttr := tp.Tracer(\"SpanProcessor\")\n\tctx, span := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_UpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"constraintsegmentkey\",\n\t\t\tType:       32,\n\t\t\tProperty:   \"constraintproperty\",\n\t\t\tOperator:   \"eq\",\n\t\t\tValue: req.Type,\n\t\tProperty:   req.Property,\n\t\tOperator:   req.Operator,\n\t\tValue:      req.Value,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := \"CreateConstraint\",\n\t}\n\n\ttp := sdktrace.NewTracerProvider(sdktrace.WithSampler(sdktrace.AlwaysSample()))\n\ttp.RegisterSpanProcessor(sdktrace.NewSimpleSpanProcessor(exporterSpy))\n\n\ttr := tp.Tracer(\"SpanProcessor\")\n\tctx, span := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_UpdateConstraint(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       =
